title: German Fried Chicken Tacos
description: A twist on traditional tacos, with crispy German-style fried chicken, served with your favorite toppings.
instructions: 1. In a shallow dish, mix together flour, paprika, and Mexican seasonings.
2. In a separate dish, beat eggs and mix with milk.
3. Cut chicken into strips and season with salt and pepper.
4. Dip each chicken strip into the egg mixture, then coat in flour mixture, shaking off excess.
5. Heat about 1/2 inch of vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
6. Fry chicken strips until golden brown and cooked through, about 5-7 minutes.
7. Warm tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
8. Assemble tacos with fried chicken, your favorite toppings, and serve immediately.
9. Serve with additional tortillas, toppings, and condiments on the side.
